name: zenemic-backend
description: Zenemic backend monorepo — the main-app and keyboard services over a shared package.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @zenemic/shared && npm run build -w @zenemic/main-app && npm run build -w @zenemic/keyboard
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @zenemic/shared && npm run typecheck -w @zenemic/main-app && npm run typecheck -w @zenemic/keyboard
